ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's arena */,
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoff, preseason) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance in a season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "overtime_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded */,
  "points_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of points earned in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Center, Defenseman) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the player */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance in a season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  "shooting_percentage" REAL /* Shooting percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is currently on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "general_managers" (
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each general manager */,
  "general_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the general manager */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the general manager is currently on */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the general manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the general manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the general manager */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("general_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_general_managers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went to overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went to a shootout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff series */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., First Round, Quarterfinals) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the home team */,
  "away_team_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the away team */,
  "series_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_series_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_series_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_games" (
  "playoff_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playoff series */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went to overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went to a shootout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES playoff_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team affiliation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, penalty, hit) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event in the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the award was won in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
